name: lev-innovation-marketing-system
description: Reusable HyperFrames video production base for Agentyx product and brand videos.

scripts.check:agentyx: cd videos/agentyx-product-promo && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 lint && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 validate && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 inspect --samples 15
scripts.render:agentyx: cd videos/agentyx-product-promo && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 render --output renders/agentyx-product-promo.mp4
scripts.check:what-is: cd videos/agentyx-what-is && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 lint && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 validate && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 inspect --samples 15
scripts.render:what-is: cd videos/agentyx-what-is && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.7 render --output renders/agentyx-what-is.mp4
